label: 6665 Applicable rules

amendments: Effective DateSection applicable to returns the due date for which (determined without regard to extensions) is after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1989 Amendment note under .Dec. 31, 1989section 7721(d) of Pub. L. 101–239section 461 of this title

children.text: the additions to the tax, additional amounts, and penalties provided by this chapter shall be paid upon notice and demand and shall be assessed, collected, and paid in the same manner as taxes; and
any reference in this title to “tax” imposed by this title shall be deemed also to refer to the additions to the tax, additional amounts, and penalties provided by this chapter.

children.heading: Procedure for assessing certain additions to tax
children.label: b Procedure for assessing certain additions to tax

children.text: in the case of an addition described in section 6651, to that portion of such addition which is attributable to a deficiency in tax described in section 6211; or
to an addition described in section 6654 or 6655, if no return is filed for the taxable year.
